title: Rank-2 staged candidate heuristic scan for catalog drift resilience
problem: Live rank-2 operator proofs blind-select OFFSET 1 candidate by priority score. OpenAlex catalog drift yields rank-2 artifacts without the constraint management marker, causing unsuitable_live_rank2_artifact skips on all per-step live proofs. Ticket-233 hardened fetch; rank-2 selection still needs top-N heuristic scan.
acceptance_criteria: select_rank2_staged_candidate_id scans top-N queued candidates (after rank-1) for rank-2 title heuristic before fetch.
Live rank-2 pytest spines use heuristic scan; skip only when no candidate in window matches.
Staged orchestrator rank-2 id selection uses same helper when live discover path is active.
Rank-1 selection unchanged (OFFSET 0). unsuitable_live_rank2_artifact semantics preserved when no match.
Unit tests cover scan success, fallback skip, and rank-1 isolation.
Golden pass; default pytest remains mock-only without live_network.
non_goals: Live Ollama gate or fallthrough changes.
Broadening rank-2 heuristic markers beyond staged_spine_heuristics contract.
rollback_plan: Revert staged_candidate_selection module; restore OFFSET 1 rank-2 selection.
